steps.title: Use the broad claim
steps.content: The sentence before the blank says the research was extremely influential in the fight against CFCs. The sentence after the blank names a concrete result: the research laid the foundation for a treaty phasing out CFCs.

steps.title: Choose a specifying transition
steps.content: Choice B signals proceeding despite something, but no obstacle is introduced. Choice C signals an earlier time, even though the 1987 treaty came after the 1974 research. Choice D signals contrast, but the treaty supports the claim of influence. The answer is A.
